CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, utf8_string String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Привет'), (2, 'こんにちは'), (3, '안녕하세요'), (4, '你好'), (5, 'Hello');
SELECT rightUTF8(utf8_string, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT rightUTF8(utf8_string, -3) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT rightUTF8(utf8_string, 0) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT rightUTF8(utf8_string, 10) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT rightUTF8(utf8_string, -10) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, rightUTF8(utf8_string, 4) AS substring FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, rightUTF8(utf8_string, -1) AS substring FROM test_strings WHERE utf8_string != '';
SELECT rightUTF8(utf8_string, 5) FROM (SELECT utf8_string FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (1, 3));
SELECT t.id, rightUTF8(t.utf8_string, 3) AS right_substring FROM test_strings AS t JOIN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE id < 5) AS sub ON t.id = sub.id;
SELECT rightUTF8((SELECT utf8_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2), 3);
SELECT utf8_string, rightUTF8(utf8_string, 1) AS last_char FROM test_strings WHERE utf8_string IS NOT NULL;
